title: orchis diphylla
intro: Orchis diphylla, also known as the Dalmatian orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including inflammation and respiratory issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The medicinal properties of Orchis diphylla are believed to offer several health benefits, including relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing coughs. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and powdered to be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness their medicinal properties.
